About Seedling Sports

We help parents make confident, science-backed decisions about their child's athletic development.

Youth sports should be a positive experience — one that builds character, confidence, and a lifelong love of movement. But for many families, it's become a source of stress, confusion, and pressure.

Seedling Sports exists to change that. We translate the latest research in sports science, child development, and psychology into clear, actionable guidance for parents of young athletes.

Whether your child plays soccer, basketball, football, or any other sport — we're here to help you support them the right way.

© 2026 Seedling Sports
